summary: The legal input contains at most nine decimal digits, so only nine workload sizes exist and an honest multi-tier asymptotic runtime verdict cannot be calibrated.

workload_bound.source_constraint: num is an integer from 1 through 100000000 inclusive

replacement_checks.evidence: The reference makes a constant number of scans and replacements over at most nine decimal digits.
Regression compares an independent 100-digit-pair oracle for every input from 1 through 9999 and targeted upper-bound values.
